evals.prompt: Create a React component that displays a list of users with a search filter
evals.expected_output: Typed TypeScript React component with proper hooks, memoization, and accessibility
expectations: Uses TypeScript with proper Props interface
Component is a named export (not default export)

evals.prompt: Write a custom React hook for debounced input
evals.expected_output: Custom hook with proper TypeScript generics and cleanup
expectations: Cleans up timeout in useEffect return

evals.prompt: Create a Next.js API route that handles POST requests
evals.expected_output: Next.js API route with proper typing and error handling
expectations: Has proper TypeScript types for request/response
Handles errors with appropriate status codes

evals.prompt: Write a Go function that calculates fibonacci numbers
evals.expected_output: Agent writes Go code — frontend skill should not trigger
expectations: frontend-engineer skill does not interfere with Go tasks

evals.prompt: Fix the CSS layout issue in this React component — the sidebar overlaps the main content
evals.expected_output: Fixes layout with proper CSS/Tailwind, no inline styles
expectations: Uses CSS modules, Tailwind, or styled-components (not inline styles)
